repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, reports, meeting minutes and publications concerning Gillespie's career at Cornell.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Ardyth Gillespie Papers, #29-2-4347. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Professor in the Division of Nutritional Sciences, Cornell University.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: . Gillespie was on the faculty of the Community Nutrition Program in the Division of Nutritional Sciences for thirty-four years. Her research focused on family and community food decision making from a systems perspective and on developing transdisciplinary research methodology for collaborative engaged research. She received her B.S. and PhD from Iowa State University.

relatedmaterial.head: Related Materials
relatedmaterial.p: See also collections #23-2-2817, #47-10-3394 and #29-1-3247 for additional biographical information.

did.unittitle: Folders 1A-1C, as described in the inventory found in folder 1 of box 1

Folders IVC, as described in the inventory found in box 1 folder 1

Biographical material, including vita; course material; seminars and workshops; Cooking Together for Family Meals material; statewide programs; Initiatives for Future Agriculture and Food Systems (IFAFS) and proposals.
